title: zotovia acicularis
intro: Zotovia acicularis, a plant species native to New Caledonia, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Zotovia acicularis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and branches, which are then used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils.
